parameters.query:
WITH plate_gen AS (
  SELECT generate_plate($1::CHAR(1), $2::CHAR(2), $3::CHAR(2)) AS plate
)
INSERT INTO assets (
  plate, plate_status, name, description,
  asset_type_code, puc_account, brand, model,
  serial, quantity, reference_value,
  city_code, building_id, location, floor, block,
  responsable_raw, status, source_sheet, content_hash,
  incorporation_year
)
SELECT
  p.plate, 'GENERADA',
  $4, NULLIF($5, ''),
  $3, $3,
  NULLIF($6, ''), NULLIF($7, ''), NULLIF($8, ''),
  $9::INTEGER, $10::NUMERIC(15,2),
  $1, $11::INTEGER,
  NULLIF($12, ''), NULLIF($13, ''), NULLIF($14, ''),
  NULLIF($15, ''),
  'ACTIVO', $16, $17,
  $18::INTEGER
FROM plate_gen p
RETURNING id, plate

schema.id: ORDEN DE COMPRA N° / FACTURA DE VENTA
schema.displayName: ORDEN DE COMPRA N° / FACTURA DE VENTA

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sync_log (
  source_sheet,
  insertados,
  fallidos,
  placas_generadas
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2::INTEGER,
  $3::INTEGER,
  $4::jsonb
)
RETURNING
  id,
  source_sheet,
  insertados,
  fallidos,
  placas_generadas,
  created_at;
